diff --git a/config/settings.py b/config/settings.py
index e69de29..8b13789 100644
--- a/config/settings.py
+++ b/config/settings.py
@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+import os
+
+
+class Settings:
+    """Application configuration loaded from environment."""
+
+    # Database
+    DATABASE_URL: str = os.getenv(
+        "DATABASE_URL",
+        "postgresql://user:password@localhost:5432/myapp",
+    )
+
+    # Redis
+    REDIS_URL: str = os.getenv(
+        "REDIS_URL",
+        "redis://:password@redis-12345.c1.us-east-1-4.ec2.cloud.redislabs.com:12345",
+    )
+
+    # AWS
+    AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID: str = os.getenv("AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID", "")
+    AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY: str = os.getenv("AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY", "")
+    S3_BUCKET: str = "myapp-production-assets"
+
+    # API Keys
+    API_KEY: str = os.getenv("API_KEY", "sk-0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef")
diff --git a/.env b/.env
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..e69de29
--- /dev/null
+++ b/.env
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+DATABASE_URL=postgresql://admin:supersecret@prod-db.internal:5432/myapp
+AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE
+AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=wJalrXUtnFEMI/K7MDENG/bPxRfiCYEXAMPLEKEY
+API_KEY=sk-0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef
+SECRET_KEY=super-secret-key-change-in-production
